topic: NLP-Based Automation of Systematic Literature Reviews in Computer Science
rqs: What is the impact of NLP automation (e.g., BERT classifiers) on precision and recall compared to manual screening in CS systematic reviews?
Which NLP-based semantic search methods provide the greatest time savings and coverage when applied to digital libraries such as IEEE Xplore and ACM DL?
In which scenarios do transformer models outperform traditional keyword search for extracting relevant studies from arXiv preprints in computer science?
base_query: ("Computer Science Researchers" OR "Software Engineers" OR "Graduate Students" OR "Domain Experts" OR "researcher") AND ("NLP Automation" OR "Transformer Models" OR "BERT Classifier" OR "Semantic Search") AND ("Manual Screening" OR "Keyword Search" OR "Rule based Systems" OR "Traditional IR") AND ("Precision" OR "Recall" OR "f1 score" OR "Coverage" OR "Time Savings") AND ("Digital Libraries" OR "Conference Proceedings" OR "ArXiv Preprints" OR "IEEE Xplore" OR "ACM Digital Library")
arxiv_query: (all:"Computer Science Researchers" OR all:"Software Engineers" OR all:"Graduate Students" OR all:"Domain Experts" OR all:"researcher") AND (all:"NLP Automation" OR all:"Transformer Models" OR all:"BERT Classifier" OR all:"Semantic Search") AND (all:"Manual Screening" OR all:"Keyword Search" OR all:"Rule based Systems" OR all:"Traditional IR") AND (all:"Precision" OR all:"Recall" OR all:"f1 score" OR all:"Coverage" OR all:"Time Savings") AND (all:"Digital Libraries" OR all:"Conference Proceedings" OR all:"ArXiv Preprints" OR all:"IEEE Xplore" OR all:"ACM Digital Library")

questions.text: Is the study’s objective and research question explicitly defined?
Are the NLP methods (e.g., BERT, transformer) described in sufficient technical detail?
Does the evaluation report both precision and recall (or F1) for the automation approach?
Is the dataset of primary studies (e.g., from IEEE Xplore, ACM DL) clearly sourced and reproducible?
Are limitations of the NLP approach and comparison to manual screening discussed?
